title: Exact Steps: Create an Option Set

steps.action: Navigate to Product > Option Sets in the left navigation pane
steps.detail: The Option Sets folder is located under the Product node in the folder tree.

steps.action: Right-click the Option Sets folder and select New Option Set
steps.detail: This opens the New Option Set creation wizard.
steps.hint: If you don't see the right-click menu, ensure you have the correct permissions.

steps.action: Enter Color Options as the Name and click OK
steps.detail: The name must be unique within the product context.

tasks.title: Add Choices to the Option Set

steps.action: Open the newly created Color Options option set
steps.detail: Double-click or select and press Enter to open it.
Each choice represents one selectable option for the customer.

steps.action: Enter Red as the choice name and click OK

steps.detail: You should now have three choices in the option set.
